texto: You should never attack a necromancer in a cemetery
autor: it’s like chasing Rambo into a building full of loaded guns. Some people seem to help you kill them.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it’s like chasing Rambo into a building full of loaded guns. Some people seem to help you kill them. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You should never attack a necromancer in a cemetery” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, laurell-k-hamilton, dead-ice, útil em momentos de dead-ice.
